$comment: OpenClaw agents.list[] fragment. Merge this object into agents.list[] in the bot's openclaw.json so the main agent can target it via sessions_spawn(agentId: "media-director"). Subagents inject only AGENTS.md + TOOLS.md from the workspace below. Model is left unset to inherit agents.defaults.model (openai/gpt-5.5); set agents.defaults.subagents.model to run subagents cheaper. Requires the main agent to have sessions_spawn (tools.profile coding|full, or tools.alsoAllow).
name: media-director
